name: intent
_design_note_: Opus default because intent capture is reasoning-heavy: surfacing the right premise to challenge from a vague goal is exactly the failure mode Karpathy named (#1: wrong assumptions running uncaught). Cheaper than burning $0.50+ on a Scout pointed at the wrong direction.
_allowed_tools_design_note_: v9.0.2: stripped exploration surface (Grep, Glob, Bash(ls/head/tail/wc/find/test/git*)). The intent persona's job is to STRUCTURE the goal, not VERIFY it. With exploration tools available, the persona did 7 turns of evidence-gathering in cycle 11 ($1.05). Scout re-reads the same files anyway. Keeping Read + Bash(cat:*) so the persona can read its own scratchpad or a pre-loaded context file if the orchestrator stages one; everything else removed forces a single-pass parse-then-write flow.
_disallowed_design_note_: WebSearch/WebFetch are explicitly denied — intent persona's job is to STRUCTURE, not RESEARCH. Scout researches. Otherwise mirrors scout.json's denylist verbatim per Plan-agent finding (intent persona must not become weakest-link attack surface).
_budget_design_note_: v9.0.2: lowered default from $0.50 to $0.30 after cycle-11 evidence ($1.05 burn on a goal of moderate complexity). With exploration tools stripped (v9.0.2 allowed_tools change), the agent is structurally bounded to 1-2 turns and ~30-80 lines of output. heavy_rules tier kept for genuinely heavy CLAUDE.md cases but capped lower ($0.60). minimal=$0.15. The old $0.50 cap was set as a generous backstop assuming multi-turn exploration was load-bearing; v9.0.2's evidence shows it was paying for duplicate work Scout redoes.
_max_turns_design_note_: v9.0.2: lowered from 15 to 4. Two turns are the design target (parse + write); 4 leaves headroom for one re-write iteration or a tool-call mistake. With exploration tools stripped, the agent literally cannot productively use 15 turns.
_sandbox_design_note_: allow_network: false because intent persona has no legitimate network reason. Scout has allow_network: true. Smaller blast radius if persona is hijacked.
